mapper.select: SELECT T2.CONTRACT_NUM ,T2.SUB_LINK_NAME ,T2.CUSTOMER_ID ,T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP T1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{mobileNo} AND T2.SUB_STATUS = 'A'

SELECT T2.CONTRACT_NUM ,T2.SUB_LINK_NAME ,T2.CUSTOMER_ID ,T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP T1, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{mobileNo} AND T2.SUB_STATUS != 'A'

SELECT A.USERID , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS USER_NM , A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO AS MOBILE_NO , A.SVC_CNTR_NO AS CONTRACT_NUM , A.REP_NO , B.MODEL_NAME , B.MODEL_ID , B.SUB_STATUS , A.SYS_RDATE , C.CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B, MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP C WHERE B.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{cntrUserId}) AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY A.REP_NO ASC

SELECT T2.CONTRACT_NUM ,T2.SUB_LINK_NAME ,T2.CUSTOMER_ID ,T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE ,T2.SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP T1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{mobileNo} AND T2.SUB_STATUS = 'A'

SELECT /*UserManageMapper.getMcpUserCntrInfoAByUserId*/ A.USERID AS USER_ID, B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS USER_NM, A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO AS MOBILE_NO, A.SVC_CNTR_NO AS CONTRACT_NUM FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE 1 = 1 AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{userId}) AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB_STATUS = 'A'
